seo.title: About Bekur — operational systems for operators
seo.description: Bekur Technologies maps how professional service firms work and ships custom automation with fixed scope and hard AI caps. Senior-only team, global delivery.

hero.headline: Helping professional service firms grow
hero.subheadline: Bekur helps managing partners streamline operations and reclaim billable hours with logic-first automation — fixed scope, fixed price, and production workflows in 3–6 weeks.

whoWeAre.headline: Senior-only systems for operators who refuse shelfware
whoWeAre.body: Bekur is a senior-only operational systems team dedicated to ending AI hype fatigue for professional service firms. We map how you actually work, then ship custom automation into your existing stack — with hard AI spend caps and measurable ROI, not shelfware pilots.

stats.label: Shipped per sprint
stats.description: One production workflow end-to-end — not a sprawling transformation program.

stats.label: From kickoff to go-live
stats.description: Fixed scope, fixed price, and partner approval built into every Automation Sprint.

stats.label: To measurable ROI
stats.description: Outcomes targeted after go-live — not eighteen-month roadmaps.

mission: To free small professional service firms from AI hype fatigue — by mapping how they actually operate and shipping custom automation that adapts to their stack, with predictable economics and 3–6 week delivery.
vision: Every small professional service firm running on automation built to its own business logic — partners back to client work, AI spend on a leash, and operational debt off the books.

delivery.serviceArea: United States, United Kingdom, Canada, Australia — global delivery

teamPrinciple: Small is intentional. The people in the room build the work — senior-only, no juniors learning on client sprints.

proofPoints.headline: Finden AI — #3 Product of the Day
proofPoints.detail: Product Hunt — ranked ahead of Vercel v0

proofPoints.headline: Production systems operators trust
proofPoints.detail: Outcome-led case studies — every claim backed by a shipped system in the portfolio
